narrative: New Zealand Dollar firms above 0.5737 as RBNZ signals further policy tightening, anchoring a dominant G10 outperformance theme where NZD leads the weekly scorecard (+0.977% avg, n=4) against a weakening JPY (-0.804% avg, n=7) with a 1.782% spread. The 250bp NZD/CHF OIS carry advantage supports the kiwi bid, while gold rises +0.79% to $4,115, equities retreat -0.28%, DXY consolidates -0.02%, and VIX holds at 16.9. Watch the ECB rate decision on July 23 for the next major G10 policy catalyst.
